overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a Japanese village in spring. The character moves along dirt paths past traditional wooden houses and through a dense grove of blooming cherry blossom trees with petals falling, set against a backdrop of clear blue skies and distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: village path with stone walls and traditional farmhouses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path between a stone wall and wooden fences, approaching a large thatched-roof building

entered.detail: low stone wall running along the right side of the path
wooden fence and gate structure on the left side
tall pine trees in the background against the blue sky
traditional wooden Japanese house with dark timber framing
large traditional building with prominent thatched roof and open entrance
small wooden storage shed with slanted roof
cultivated garden beds with leafy green plants

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a village dirt path bordered by a stone wall on the right and wooden structures on the left. The scene is brightly lit under a clear blue sky, approaching a large traditional thatched-roof farmhouse with cultivated gardens nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between wooden buildings leading to cherry grove

events.description: passes the large farmhouse and enters a narrow shaded passage between wooden buildings
emerges from shadow into dappled sunlight of cherry blossom area

agents.ego_description: moving through a narrow corridor between buildings, transitioning from open village to enclosed passage

entered.detail: dark wooden wall of a building creating a narrow passage
white blooming cherry blossom trees visible at the end of the passage

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow, shaded passage between traditional wooden buildings, transitioning from the open village path. Light changes as the character approaches and emerges into a grove of blooming cherry trees visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cherry blossom grove with falling petals

events.description: cherry blossom petals begin falling heavily, creating a snow-like effect

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the cherry grove, looking up at the blooming canopy as petals fall around him

entered.detail: large cherry tree with dense white blossoms forming a canopy overhead
snow-capped mountain visible through the cherry trees in the distance
small traditional hut with thatched roof nestled among the trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a magical grove of fully bloomed cherry trees with white petals falling like snow. The canopy creates dappled lighting, and distant mountains become visible through the trees as the character moves deeper into the grove.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain path with stone walls and distant vistas

events.description: exits the dense cherry grove into open terrain with expansive mountain views

agents.ego_description: walking along an open path with stone walls, heading toward distant mountains with pink forested slopes

entered.detail: stacked stone wall running along the left side of the path
long wooden farm structure with dark timber and sloped roof
distant mountain slopes covered in pink flowering trees under clear blue sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the cherry grove, the character enters an open area with a stone wall on the left and farm buildings on the right. The view opens up to reveal expansive mountains covered in pink flowering forests under the bright midday sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a traditional Japanese village that gradually transforms into a breathtaking landscape of blooming cherry blossoms and distant mountains. It begins with the character walking along a bright dirt path bordered by a stone wall and wooden structures, approaching a large thatched-roof farmhouse. As the character moves forward, the open path narrows into a shaded passage between buildings before emerging into a magical grove of fully bloomed cherry trees. The scene then shifts into a canopy of falling white petals and dappled light, with the silhouettes of mountains appearing through the branches as the character moves deeper into the grove. Finally, the camera exits the trees into an open area with farm buildings, where the view expands to reveal vast, pink-flowered forests stretching toward the mountains under a bright midday sun.
